title: Redesign InteractiveCode as a react-bits-style interactive code-editor card
reference: Dark macOS code-editor card: traffic-light dots, component pill (chevron) top-right, syntax-highlighted JSX of the <Typewriter/> usage, inline-editable values, 'Drag or click values to edit' footer hint.

stories.title: Inline editable value primitives
stories.description: Build inline-editable code-value controls used inside the rendered JSX: a draggable+click-to-type number, a color swatch+hex picker, a click-to-edit string, and a click-to-toggle boolean. All wired so editing updates the shared Typewriter state.
acceptanceCriteria: A DraggableNumber control: horizontal pointer-drag changes the value by step (clamped to min/max) and a plain click (no drag) enters an inline text-input edit mode that commits on Enter/blur
DraggableNumber supports keyboard a11y: focusable, ArrowUp/ArrowDown (or Left/Right) adjust by step
A ColorValue control shows a color swatch dot + uppercase hex and opens a native color picker on click, updating the color live
An editable string control renders the quoted text and becomes an inline input on click, committing on Enter/blur
A boolean control renders true/false and toggles on click or Enter/Space
Editing any value updates the live Typewriter preview (state -> inputProps)

stories.title: Dark code-editor card matching the reference
stories.description: Render a dark code-editor card containing the syntax-highlighted <Typewriter/> usage with the editable values placed inline. Include the title bar (traffic-light dots + component pill with chevron) and the 'Drag or click values to edit' footer hint.
acceptanceCriteria: Card has a dark editor surface with three traffic-light dots on the top-left and a component-name pill with a chevron icon on the top-right
Code is syntax-highlighted (distinct colors for keywords, component/type name, prop names, strings, numbers, booleans, punctuation) using a monospace font
Code shows the real <Typewriter/> usage with these editable props inline: text (string), fontSize (number), color (color), fontWeight (number), cursor (boolean)
A muted footer hint reads 'Drag or click values to edit'
Card chrome is bespoke (not reusing components/docs/component-customizer.tsx)

stories.title: Layout, live preview wiring, and integration
stories.description: Keep the horizontal section layout: interactive code card on the left, the live @remotion/player Typewriter on the right; stacks on mobile. Keep the #showcase anchor and page integration. Types/lint clean.
acceptanceCriteria: Section keeps id="showcase" and is still rendered from app/(home)/page.tsx in place of WorksWith->BentoRegistry gap
Horizontal layout at desktop (code card left, live Typewriter player right via @remotion/player) that stacks on mobile
The live preview reflects the inline-edited values in real time
Uses landing primitives (SectionHeading, FadeUp, SECTION) consistent with the page; no import of the docs ComponentCustomizer

No obvious TypeScript errors by static reading (imports resolve, pointer/keyboard handler types correct, analytics event shape {component, prop}); reviewer confirms it matches the reference image intent

stories.title: Refinement pass per user feedback (scrollbar, glow, preview bg, centering)
stories.description: Polish the redesigned section: remove the code scrollbar, remove the decorative glow, make the right preview card a seamless white surface (no dark background), and vertically center the live Typewriter animation in the preview card.
acceptanceCriteria: No visible scrollbar on the code editor card (scrollbar hidden while content stays accessible)
The decorative fuchsia/blur glow element is removed from the code card
The right preview card no longer uses the dark surface-card background; it is a white (video-matching) surface
The live Typewriter player is vertically centered within the preview card (flex centering), not pinned to the top of a taller stretched card
Left code editor card remains dark (unchanged intent); no TypeScript/biome regressions by static reading
